'''kojathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:iliopubic|iliopubic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-j-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:iliopubic|iliopubic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kojathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojathithi|kojathithi]] || [[word:kojathiji|kojathiji]] || [[word:kojathishi|kojathishi]] || [[word:kojathiki|kojathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojathuthuthu|kojathuthuthu]] || [[word:kojathujuju|kojathujuju]] || [[word:kojathushushu|kojathushushu]] || [[word:kojathukuku|kojathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojathuthu|kojathuthu]] || [[word:kojathuju|kojathuju]] || [[word:kojathushu|kojathushu]] || [[word:kojathuku|kojathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojathufthuf|kojathufthuf]] || [[word:kojathufjuf|kojathufjuf]] || [[word:kojathufshuf|kojathufshuf]] || [[word:kojathufkuf|kojathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojathethe|kojathethe]] || [[word:kojatheje|kojatheje]] || [[word:kojatheshe|kojatheshe]] || [[word:kojatheke|kojatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojathothotho|kojathothotho]] || [[word:kojathojojo|kojathojojo]] || [[word:kojathoshosho|kojathoshosho]] || [[word:kojathokoko|kojathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojathotho|kojathotho]] || [[word:kojathojo|kojathojo]] || [[word:kojathosho|kojathosho]] || [[word:kojathoko|kojathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojathofthof|kojathofthof]] || [[word:kojathofjof|kojathofjof]] || [[word:kojathofshof|kojathofshof]] || [[word:kojathofkof|kojathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfthĂŻf|kojathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfjĂŻf|kojathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfshĂŻf|kojathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfkĂŻf|kojathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|kojathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|kojathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|kojathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|kojathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfthĂŻf|kojathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfjĂŻf|kojathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfshĂŻf|kojathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfkĂŻf|kojathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfthĂŻf|kojathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfjĂŻf|kojathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfshĂŻf|kojathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:kojathĂŻfkĂŻf|kojathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kojathĂŠthĂŠ|kojathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:kojathĂŠjĂŠ|kojathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:kojathĂŠshĂŠ|kojathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:kojathĂŠkĂŠ|kojathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kojathathatha|kojathathatha]] || [[word:kojathajaja|kojathajaja]] || [[word:kojathashasha|kojathashasha]] || [[word:kojathakaka|kojathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kojathatha|kojathatha]] || [[word:kojathaja|kojathaja]] || [[word:kojathasha|kojathasha]] || [[word:kojathaka|kojathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kojathafthaf|kojathafthaf]] || [[word:kojathafjaf|kojathafjaf]] || [[word:kojathafshaf|kojathafshaf]] || [[word:kojathafkaf|kojathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:kojathasha|kojathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:kojathshĂ«asha|kojathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kojathroasha|kojathroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kojathmuasha|kojathmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:kojathyaasha|kojathyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokojathnkshĂ«asha|gokojathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokojathnkroasha|gokojathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokojathnkmuasha|gokojathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokojathnkyaasha|gokojathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:kojajathasha|kojajathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kojajathshĂ«asha|kojajathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kojajathroasha|kojajathroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kojajathmuasha|kojajathmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kojajathyaasha|kojajathyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokojajathnkshĂ«asha|gokojajathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokojajathnkroasha|gokojajathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokojajathnkmuasha|gokojajathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokojajathnkyaasha|gokojajathnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:kejĂŠthasha|kejĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kejĂŠthshĂ«asha|kejĂŠthshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kejĂŠthroasha|kejĂŠthroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kejĂŠthmuasha|kejĂŠthmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kejĂŠthyaasha|kejĂŠthyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokejĂŠthnkshĂ«asha|gokejĂŠthnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokejĂŠthnkroasha|gokejĂŠthnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokejĂŠthnkmuasha|gokejĂŠthnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokejĂŠthnkyaasha|gokejĂŠthnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:kojfathasha|kojfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:kojfathshĂ«asha|kojfathshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kojfathroasha|kojfathroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kojfathmuasha|kojfathmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kojfathyaasha|kojfathyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokojfathnkshĂ«asha|gokojfathnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokojfathnkroasha|gokojfathnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokojfathnkmuasha|gokojfathnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gokojfathnkyaasha|gokojfathnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
